Soviet weapon: microwaves beamed at persons, causing fatigue, confusion, psychosis and even heart failure. She said, "Those affected by the microwave transmissions have the impression of hearing words in their head." This I think is a payoff for me, to have heard this. This accounts for the origin of my 3-74 experience, at least the period in which I was positive that I was somehow being influenced by the Soviet Union, probably —as I thought at the time— through microwave transmissions.
